metadata.title: Summer Of '69
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.93] I got my first real six-string
[00:07.94] Bought it at the five and dime
[00:11.33] Played it 'til my fingers bled
[00:14.59] Was the summer of '69
[00:18.29] Me and some guys from school
[00:21.59] Had a band and we tried real hard
[00:24.86] Jimmy quit and Jody got married
[00:28.26] I should've known we'd never get far
[00:32.53] Oh, when I look back now
[00:35.24] That summer seemed to last forever
[00:38.94] And if I had the choice
[00:42.42] Yeah, I'd always wanna be there
[00:45.87] Those were the best days of my life
[00:50.85] 
[00:56.58] Ain't no use in complainin'
[00:59.40] When you got a job to do
[01:02.74] I spent my evenings down at the drive-in
[01:07.10] And that's when I met you, yeah!
[01:09.98] Standin' on your mama's porch
[01:13.07] You told me that you'd wait forever
[01:16.87] Oh, and when you held my hand
[01:20.07] I knew that it was now or never
[01:23.73] Those were the best days of my life
[01:29.30] Oh, yeah
[01:32.03] Back in the summer of '69, oh
[01:37.45] 
[01:40.90] Man, we were killin' time
[01:43.22] We were young and restless
[01:45.43] We needed to unwind
[01:48.44] I guess nothing can last forever
[01:51.74] Forever, no
[01:57.21] Yeah
[01:59.60] 
[02:08.46] And now the times are changin'
[02:11.98] Look at everything that's come and gone
[02:15.36] Sometimes when I play that old six-string
[02:18.59] I think about you, wonder what went wrong
[02:22.27] Standin' on your mama's porch
[02:25.75] You told me that it'd last forever
[02:29.18] Oh, and when you held my hand
[02:32.65] I knew that it was now or never
[02:36.12] Those were the best days of my life
[02:41.72] Oh, yeah
[02:44.48] Back in the summer of '69, uh-huh
[02:51.47] It was the summer of '69, oh, yeah
[02:57.84] Me and my baby in '69, oh, oh
[03:05.88] 
[03:09.36] It was the summer, summer, summer of '69
[03:16.55] (Yeah)
[03:17.59]
